conformance_scope: Controlled assistant-run fixture review of staged installed surfaces; not target validation, not installation, and not a real or accepted target adapter.

preserved: All files in the fixture target repository were left unchanged
skipped: Staged adapter completion or rewrite was out of scope
Build and screenshot commands were not inferred or invented

approval_needs: None for this read-only review and external report write; target-owner approval would be needed before accepting project facts or completing the adapter
manifest_version_handling: All manifest version fields are unresolved placeholders; no installed or accepted version was claimed.

expansion_reasons: Inspected the three named target fact surfaces
Loaded only the specific adapter owners needed for required report keys: module profile, source registry, operation help, output contract, and AI infrastructure inventory

changed_fact_ids: none: the review was read-only and no target or adapter fact changed
selected_relationships: none: no changed fact and no evidence that the optional consistency-map module is enabled
skipped_relationships: consistency-map traversal skipped because its module state and target relationship facts remain placeholders
companion_surfaces_checked: root file inventory for assistant entry points
unresolved_gaps: accepted target-specific root assistant entry points missing; host-loaded AGENTS.md is a staged placeholder entry
canonical source-of-truth owners and relationship coverage unresolved
target validation and manual-review policy unresolved

module_profile_status: Required core profile is unresolved because all state and evidence fields are placeholders
installed-operations enabled only after root assistant entry points exist
diagrams not-applicable or deferred until target diagram policy exists
effectiveness-metrics deferred unless the target wants measurement
consistency-map and other optional modules remain unresolved and were not treated as enabled
source_of_truth_registry_status: Registry file exists but every canonical owner, relationship, validation, and approval field inspected is unresolved placeholder evidence
README.md, src/App.txt, and package.json were observed as surfaces but were not promoted to canonical owners
task_specific_maturity: Discovery maturity only: minimal source surfaces are identifiable
Adapter maturity is incomplete because ownership, policies, modules, validation, and root entry points are unresolved
bridge_capability_status: Codex used the host-loaded AGENTS.md entry, but no accepted target-specific root assistant bridge capability was established

bridge_behavior_evidence.auto_load_observed: yes for host-provided AGENTS.md; this does not prove an accepted target installation
bridge_behavior_evidence.help_found: yes, .ai/assistant/help.md exists, but its target facts are placeholders
bridge_behavior_evidence.context_router_found: yes, .ai/assistant/context-router.json was loaded and used for compact routing
known_surface_limitations: No accepted target-specific root assistant entry points
Supported assistants and bridge ownership remain unresolved placeholders

operation_help_status: Help surface exists and describes request routing, but placeholder target facts prevent treating installed operations or local commands as enabled
output_contract_status: Adapter output-contract template exists; its installation, update, and recheck evidence fields remain unresolved placeholders and no accepted contract completion is claimed
ai_infrastructure_inventory_status: Inventory template exists but contains no resolved target items, provenance, permissions, or validation evidence; no AI infrastructure was imported or executed

unresolved: No target validation command or manual-review procedure is resolved in the staged adapter
No build, visual, screenshot, or accessibility validation was run or invented
Only the external conformance report checker is eligible to run after report creation

residual_risk: The staged adapter cannot safely guide real target work until placeholders are replaced from target evidence
UI behavior intent cannot be distinguished from placeholder content
Visual and accessibility regressions cannot be assessed without target-owned policies and checks
Installed operations must remain disabled until accepted root entry points and ownership exist
